'''kafana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyat|kyat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyat|kyat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kafana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæfænæth|kæfænæth]] || [[word:kæfænæj|kæfænæj]] || [[word:kæfænæsh|kæfænæsh]] || [[word:kæfænæ|kæfænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafafanath|kafafanath]] || [[word:kafafanaj|kafafanaj]] || [[word:kafafanash|kafafanash]] || [[word:kafafana|kafafana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafanath|kafanath]] || [[word:kafanaj|kafanaj]] || [[word:kafanash|kafanash]] || [[word:kafana|kafana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafafnath|kafafnath]] || [[word:kafafnaj|kafafnaj]] || [[word:kafafnash|kafafnash]] || [[word:kafafnaf|kafafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kafanatha|kafanatha]] || [[word:kafanaja|kafanaja]] || [[word:kafanasha|kafanasha]] || [[word:kafanaka|kafanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kafanath|kafanath]] || [[word:kafanaj|kafanaj]] || [[word:kafanash|kafanash]] || [[word:kafana|kafana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kafanathal|kafanathal]] || [[word:kafanajal|kafanajal]] || [[word:kafanashal|kafanashal]] || [[word:kafanakal|kafanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kafanathatha|kafanathatha]] || [[word:kafanajaja|kafanajaja]] || [[word:kafanashasha|kafanashasha]] || [[word:kafanaka|kafanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kafanathan|kafanathan]] || [[word:kafanajan|kafanajan]] || [[word:kafanashan|kafanashan]] || [[word:kafanakan|kafanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kafanathaoro|kafanathaoro]] || [[word:kafanajaoro|kafanajaoro]] || [[word:kafanashaoro|kafanashaoro]] || [[word:kafanakaoro|kafanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
